# Motor Definition File: AeroTech K550W
# Generated from certified motor specifications
# Source: ThrustCurve.org - TRA Certification March 5, 2006

# Motor Type: Reloadable (RMS-54/1706 case)
# Propellant: White Lightning (APCP)
# Average Thrust: 536 N
# Peak Thrust: 655.3 N
# Total Impulse: 1539.1 Ns
# Burn Time: 3.02 s
# Propellant Mass: 0.889 kg
# Total Mass: 1.487 kg

# This is a solid propellant motor, so all propellant is treated as "fuel"
# Oxidizer flow rate is set to zero

# Meters, all Z-coordinate, assumed centered
BurnedOxidizerInitialCG     0
BurnedOxidizerLastCG        0
BurnedFuelInitialCG         -1.545
BurnedFuelLastCG            -1.545
